style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram of a paint-by-number illustration partway through being filled in. The subject is the line-art front elevation of a simple symmetrical civic building, drawn as clean outlined regions. Some regions are already painted with flat colour, a few in deep navy and a few in rust, and the remaining regions are left as empty cream outlines still waiting to be filled. To the right sits a small vertical colour key of four plain flat swatches, navy, rust, stone, and cream, each with a short word label beside it. Do not draw any numbers or digits anywhere in the image; the regions are plain shapes, never numbered. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper, calm and architectural. No people, no logos.
